story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_0200_10: Actually, no. Did the future change?
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_0500_10: My Lucario sensed a strong aura.
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_0700_10: (A Lucario sync pair of unknown limit...)
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_1000_10: All right, Lucario. Let’s test our training!
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_1100_10:
(What power! They haven’t even
Mega Evolved!)
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_1300_10: (The victory I foresaw is starting to change.)
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_1600_10:
Their aura changed? Seems she’s trying to
shake things up.
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_1700_10:
I’m going to trust the path Alakazam and I
have walked together...
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_1800_10: and grasp a victorious future once again!
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_2100_10:
I’ll show you the power Alakazam and I
have honed!
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_2200_10: Well done. We lost fair and square.
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_2300_10:
Thanks for the match. It was a valuable
experience.
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_2500_10: Thank you, all, for doing this for us.
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_2600_10:
Next time, I’ll finally win against Korrina
and Lucario.
story_arceus_09_08000/2401_1001_2800_10: Is that the future you see?
